title: BEM-739 repair dispatcher
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tmp']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'
active_check=Path('scripts/claude_dispatcher_active_check.py')
active_check.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nimport os\nfrom pathlib import Path\nactive_file=Path("governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json")\nactive=False\nif active_file.exists():\n    try:\n        active=json.loads(active_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")).get("active") is True\n    except:\n        active=False\nout=Path(os.environ.get("GITHUB_OUTPUT", "governance/tmp/claude_dispatcher_output.env"))\nout.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nwith out.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as h:\n    h.write("active="+("true" if active else "false")+"\\n")\nprint("active="+("true" if active else "false"))\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["Codex Runner"]
    types:
      - completed

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check helper scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_dispatcher_active_check.py scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py scripts/prepare_claude_inbound_context.py scripts/mark_claude_inbound_seen.py
      - name: Check active mailbox work
        id: active_check
        run: python3 scripts/claude_dispatcher_active_check.py
      - name: Record dispatcher start
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true'
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py start dispatcher_started
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true'
        id: claude_response
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest file in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a concise response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with a filename containing the BEM id.
            Include explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED when asked.
            If asked why no prior response existed, explain the runtime or trigger reason based on repository evidence.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
          claude_args: |
            --max-turns 8
      - name: Record dispatcher completion
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && always()
        env:
          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_response.outcome }}
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py complete "$CLAUDE_OUTCOME"
      - name: Commit dispatcher state
        if: always()
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md governance/state governance/reports governance/transport || true
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-739 Claude dispatcher state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'dispatcher_workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_inline_python_heredoc','pass':'python3 - <<' not in text and '<<PY' not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'active_check_script_exists','pass':active_check.exists(),'evidence':str(active_check)},
 {'name':'workflow_run_codex_runner','pass':'workflow_run:' in text and 'Codex Runner' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_schedule_trigger','pass':'schedule:' not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='dispatcher_yaml_repaired' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'DISPATCHER_REPAIR_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'repair_claude_dispatcher_yaml.v1','bem':'BEM-739','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem739_repair_claude_dispatcher_yaml.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem739_repair_claude_dispatcher_yaml.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-739 | Repair Claude Dispatcher YAML | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Fixed invalid inline Python in claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml by moving active check into scripts/claude_dispatcher_active_check.py.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem739_repair_claude_dispatcher_yaml','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem739_repair_claude_dispatcher_yaml.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-739 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(active_check),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Repaired invalid Claude dispatcher workflow by removing inline Python and using a helper script for active check')
"""
No issue comments.
